response:
## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** Multi-Step Checkout Form With Broken Error Association **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Environmental Contrast, Keyboard Motor, Screen Reader Semantic, Cognitive Neurodivergent **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification & Reflow, Vestibular & Motion, Auditory Access --- ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | CRITICAL | 2 | | MAJOR | 9 | | MINOR | 2 | | ENHANCEMENT | 0 | --- ### Perspectives That Passed None. All four escalated perspectives have findings. --- ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role #### **Front-End Dev** - **Step indicator uses color alone to communicate status** — Environmental Contrast — MAJOR — 1.4.1 - **Error summary list items have no href to navigate to fields** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 3.3.1 - **Error messages have no ID for aria-describedby association** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 3.3.1 - **Missing lang attribute on html element** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 3.1.1 - **Error summary has no aria-live for screen reader announcements** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 4.1.3 - **Label htmlFor mismatch with input id in firstName/lastName/StreetAddress fields** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 3.3.2 - **No autocomplete attributes on form fields** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MINOR — 1.3.5 #### **Visual Design** - **Step indicator status communicated by color alone** — Environmental Contrast — MAJOR — 1.4.1 - **Error text contrast ratio may be insufficient** — Environmental Contrast — MINOR — 1.4.3 #### **Content Author** - **Error messages lack corrective suggestions** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.3.3 - **Review step re-asks information already provided** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MINOR — 3.3.7 --- ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification None. All findings are code-level and can be confirmed from source. --- ### Recommended Next Step **REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping) --- ## Detailed Findings ``` **Finding:** Step indicator uses color alone to communicate status (complete/active/upcoming) **WCAG:** 1.4.1 Use of Color **Perspective:** Environmental Contrast **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Visual Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** CSS `.step-indicator li.complete { background: #2e7d32; }` **Fix:** Add text/icons to supplement color (e.g., checkmark for complete, arrow for active) **Finding:** Error summary list items have no href to navigate to fields **WCAG:** 3.3.1 Error Identification **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** `
  • {message}
    • ` in error summary **Fix:** Wrap each error message in `` with matching `id` on inputs **Finding:** Error messages have no ID for aria-describedby association **WCAG:** 3.3.1 Error Identification **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author) **Evidence:** `{errors.firstName}` without `id` **Fix:** Add `id="firstName-error"` to error span and `aria-describedby="firstName-error"` to input **Finding:** Missing lang attribute on html element **WCAG:** 3.1.1 Language of Page **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author) **Evidence:** No `` in document **Fix:** Add `lang="en"` (or appropriate language) to `` tag **Finding:** Error summary has no aria-live for screen reader announcements **WCAG:** 4.1.3 Status Messages **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** Error summary wrapper has no `aria-live` **Fix:** Add `role="alert"` or `aria-live="polite"` to error summary container **Finding:** Label htmlFor mismatch with input id in firstName/lastName/StreetAddress fields **WCAG:** 3.3.2 Labels or Instructions **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author) **Evidence:** `` links - Add `aria-live` to error summary for screen reader announcements 2. **Semantic Structure (MAJOR):** - Fix `html` element `lang` attribute - Correct `for`/`id` mismatches in labels - Add `autocomplete` attributes to form fields 3. **Contrast & Color Use (MAJOR/MINOR):** - Supplement step indicator status with text/icons - Improve error message contrast if below 4.5:1 4. **Cognitive Clarity (MAJOR/MINOR):** - Add corrective suggestions to error messages - Remove redundant data entry in review step --- ## Next Steps 1. **Fix error association and navigation** (Front-End Dev) 2. **Add semantic structure and language attributes** (Front-End Dev) 3. **Improve visual indicators and contrast** (Visual Design) 4. **Enhance error messaging clarity** (Content Author) The component should not be shipped until all CRITICAL and MAJOR findings are resolved.
